source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition
source.population: People seeking initiation, continuation, switching, or support for contraceptive method use after medical eligibility is established.
source.exclusions: Global exact guidance for informed contraceptive choice and practical method use; partial for UAE-specific law, prescribing, and full medical-eligibility assessment, which requires the companion MEC and local review. This batch also reviews method-follow-up, entered effects, and emergency-contraception sections. added_items.final_wording: Defines method-specific examination and test classification, preserves medical eligibility as a separate assessment, and supports pregnancy-status review before method initiation.

source.title: Selected practice recommendations for contraceptive use, fourth edition
